gloss.en: a female parent

words.example: I want to buy a present for my mother.

words.example: We climbed to the top of the mountain.

gloss.en: a small furry animal with a long tail

gloss.en: a story told in moving pictures

gloss.en: a title used before a man's name

words.example: Mr Brown is our new teacher.

gloss.en: to a great degree

gloss.en: a mother

words.example: Call your mum.

words.example: My neighbor helped me move the box.

gloss.en: a person who lives near you

words.example: We've had a lot of support from our neighbour.

gloss.en: not at any time

gloss.en: recently made or not existing before

gloss.en: the dark time when people usually sleep

gloss.en: the number 90

words.example: My grandfather is almost ninety.

gloss.en: used to make a word or sentence negative

gloss.en: a person who cares for sick people

words.example: The nurse took care of the sick child.

gloss.en: used to tell the exact hour

gloss.en: the 10th month of the year

words.example: She was born in October.

gloss.en: belonging to or relating to

gloss.en: away or removed from something

gloss.en: a room or building where people work

words.example: She works in a big office in town.

gloss.en: many times

words.example: We often go there.

gloss.en: used when reacting to something said

gloss.en: safe, well, or all right

words.example: Everything will be okay.

gloss.en: having lived or existed for a long time

words.example: Do you want one or two?

gloss.en: used to introduce another choice

gloss.en: the way things are arranged

gloss.en: away from the inside of a place

gloss.en: one side of a sheet of paper in a book

gloss.en: a picture made with paint

gloss.en: two things used together

gloss.en: used to ask someone to repeat something

gloss.en: your own; not connected with others

words.example: She learned to play the piano.

words.example: The plane landed safely.

gloss.en: to do an activity regularly to improve

words.example: You need to practise every day.

gloss.en: a part of a building with walls and a floor
